ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for Carol Parker (Administrator)

The Court inquired about the receipts for deposit of funds into blocked account. Ms. Berenson stated that she has an explanation as to the additional expenses of approximately $57,500, along with the final escrow statement, that she has not filed it, that there were a lot of expenses and the house was a huge mess. The status on filing receipts for the blocked accounts is continued to May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Berenson to file a declaration in response to the Probate Examiner's notes.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (200 Naples Street, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for petitioner Carol Parker.

The cause came on for confirmation of sale of the 100% interest in the real property located at 200 Naples Street, San Francisco, California, upon terms and conditions set forth in the report of sale dated February 5, 2018. The opening bid was $668,000.00. There were no overbidders. The sale was confirmed at $668,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property, subject to review of the order. Proceeds of sale are to be placed in a blocked account, so no bond is required. Ms. Berenson reported that the sale will close in 15 days. The Court set a status hearing re deposit of funds into a blocked account for April 9, 2018 at 9.00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
